case_title: CHRISTOPHER THOMPSON VS. ROI W. YOUNG

docket_entries.description: SUBSTITUTION OF ATTORNEY: PINEDO, CRAIG A. SUBSTITUTED FOR THOMAS, JENNIFER R AS ATTORNEY FOR YOUNG, ROI W.
POS OF REPLY BRIEF IN SUPPORT OF DEFT'S FEES AND COSTS INCURRED AS PREVAILING PARTY ON MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION FILED BY DEFENDANT YOUNG, ROI W.
MINI MINUTES FOR JAN-23-2012 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT ROI YOUNG'S MOTION FOR ATTORNEYS' FEES AND COSTS INCURRED AS PREVAILING PARTY ON MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION. ARGUED AND THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DENIED. THE BETTER READING OF THE PARTIES' AGREEMENT IS THAT IT DOES NOT PROVIDE FOR AN AWARD OF FEES TO THE PARTY WHO PREVAILS ON A MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION. ORDER SIGNED. (302/HEK) JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN; COURT REPORTER: KENT GUBBINE, CSR #5797

Notice Of Motion For Attorneys' Fees And Costs Incurred As Prevailing Party On Motion To Compel Arbitration
Off Calendar Jan-23-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT ROI YOUNG'S MOTION FOR ATTORNEYS' FEES AND COSTS INCURRED AS PREVAILING PARTY ON MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION.
Appearances: Howard Olsen of the Law Office of Michael Heath (931.4207) for plaintiff and responding party; Craig Pinedo of Pinedo Law (693.9155) for defendant and moving party.
Argued and the court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: denied. The better reading of the parties' agreement is that it does not provide for an award of fees to the party who prevails on a motion to compel arbitration. Order signed. (302/HEK) Judge: Harold Kahn; Court Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR #5797

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-05-2011 Continued To Jun-15-12 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 610

Ntc Of Hearing On Petition To Compel Arbitration And Ntc Of Motion To Stay Proceedings
Off Calendar Oct-28-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. KEVIN SULLIVAN, TEL. NO. 441-1052 SPECIALLY APPEARING FOR ATTY. MICHAEL HEATH FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ATTY. CRAIG PINEDO, TEL. NO. 693-9155 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT ROI YOUNG.

RULING - A R G U E D; DEFENDANT ROI YOUNG'S Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Compel Arbitration And Notice Of Motion To Stay Proceedings - The motion to compel arbitration is granted and this action is stayed. Plaintiff to seek arbitration and AAA to determine the location arbitration will be conducted pursuant to AAA Commercial Arbitration Rules Rule R-10. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: James Mcbride, Reporter: Maria Viscio, CSR # 12353 = (JJM/302)
